runTitle: AI Engine local regression - boundary question routing fixes
coveredSurfaces: network I/O ranking: '네트워크 I/O 상위 서버 3대' now parses to deterministic monitoring-metric-ranking/network and returns ordered network rows
unsupported metric guard: 'GPU 사용률이 가장 높은 서버 3대' now returns deterministic unsupported-metric clarification instead of generic CPU/MEM/DISK fallback
unknown server guard: 'web-nginx-dc9-99 상태 알려줘' now returns deterministic server-not-found guidance with valid examples instead of falling through toward 500
ambiguous server guard: '서버 하나만 자세히 알려줘' now asks for server ID/group instead of summarizing the fleet
contextual ranking scope: after a one-server prior answer, '그중 CPU가 높은 것만' now preserves the prior target set and labels it as designated server
domain evidence integration: monitoring-boundary-guard is registered before metric/LLM fallback paths and emits semantic trace metadata
AI Engine validation: type-check, targeted vitest, full AI Engine test suite, root contract tests, line-guard, and git diff whitespace check passed
skippedSurfaces: Production Cloud Run API was not rerun because the code change has not been deployed yet
Browser AI sidebar and Vercel UI QA were not repeated for this local code regression run
Langfuse trace proof for fixed behavior is pending until deployment

expertAssessments.rationale: The QA-0681 boundary failures were fixed at local code level with deterministic regression tests and full AI Engine tests passing. Production verification remains a deployment-stage check, not a remaining local code gap.
expertAssessments.nextAction: After deployment, rerun the five fixed production API prompts and confirm Langfuse traces show monitoring-boundary-guard or deterministic metric-ranking as expected.

notes: Validation commands: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run type-check
Validation commands: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm test -- current-metrics-evidence-provider.test.ts supervisor-domain-evidence.test.ts
Validation commands: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm test
Validation commands: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run line-guard
